name: Resume Screener
description: Analyzes resumes to rank candidates against specific job requirements using semantic embeddings.

name: Skill-Job Matcher
description: Matches candidates to relevant jobs using semantic similarity and skill knowledge graphs.

name: JD Parser & Mapper
description: Extracts structured skills and requirements from unstructured job descriptions.

name: Candidate Fit Scorer
description: Predicts the long-term success of a candidate based on multiple performance dimensions.

name: Skill Gap Analyzer
description: Identifies missing skills and recommends courses to bridge the gap.

name: Market Trend Analyst
description: Analyzes salary benchmarks and evolving demand for technical skills.

name: Document Q&A (RAG)
description: Answer questions using internal documents via semantic retrieval.
